commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `resolveEmbeddedCompactionTarget` so a bare `agents.defaults.compaction.model` value can be matched against `agents.defaults.models` aliases and returned as a canonical provider/model target.

PR surface: Source +46, Tests +77. Total +123 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main returns a bare compaction override literally, and the linked issue supplies a concrete `Unknown model: openai/gpt54mini` auto-compaction log for that path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can address the PR branch by reusing the shared resolver, preserving literal collision behavior, and adding focused tests.

target.title: fix(agent): resolve compaction model alias to canonical model ref
target.author: huangting-xy
